title: Ubiquiti NanoStation Loco M2, outdoor, 2.4GHz MIMO, 2x 8dBi, AirMAX
description: Ubiquiti NanoStation Loco M2 is a powerful completely outdoor unit including 2x 8dBi (2x2 MIMO) antennas for the 2.4GHz band as a CPE solution suitable for shorter distances. The unit allows transmission speed up to 300Mbps . Compared to its predecessor has a stronger processor clocked at 400MHz and bigger memory.
